TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2351-PS
THE ARCHIVE, Vol. 34-36, Page 1716
Compiled by Ernst Jaenicke, Berlin.
Edited by Alfred-Ingomar Berndt.
Published by Otto Stollberg, publishers, Berlin, March 1937.
[Rosenberg in a speech on 7 March 1937 stated:]
The education of youth can only be carried out by those who have rescued Germany from disaster. It is therefore impossible to demand one Fuehrer, one Reich and one firmly united people as long as education is carried out by forces which are mutually exclusive of each other.
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
